alkylation reagent: treatment with either 20 mM DTT for 15 min at 65 °C or 50 mM IAA for 10 min at 30 °C
alkylation concentration: treatment with either 20 mM DTT for 15 min at 65 °C or 50 mM IAA for 10 min at 30 °C
cleavage agent: the bands were excised from the gel and digested with trypsin
reduction reagent: treatment with either 20 mM DTT for 15 min at 65 °C
reduction concentration: treatment with either 20 mM DTT for 15 min at 65 °C
